title: Littleblocks
body:
![Littleblocks Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e8139f2c11f6944e4cadfcf7220b76cf7452c74.png)

**Welcome to Littleblocks.**

Littleblocks is basically my idea on what Minecraft could've possibly been if it kept the direction seen prior to beta 1.8.
I also like to describe it as 'Minecraft, simplified', because it kind of is. There's no hunger, just stamina, for example.

[Littleblocks website](https://sites.google.com/view/littleblocks/home).

## Features
Littleblocks offers the following features:
- Stamina (no hunger)
- World gen that mimics MC Beta 1.7.3, but with modern biomes and terrain height
- Old fog (people say it looks better)
- Nicer textures
- More villages

And more!
